{{Infobox character
| name = Patriarch's wife
| introduced = Bloodline
}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Kazan]] [[Patriarch's wife]] is an [[Iron]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c10">''Bloodline'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Patriarch's wife]] wears an iron badge as a breastplate.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Patriarch's wife]] wants to take [[Maret]] back.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c10" />}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|"Maret! Forgiveness, please, I’ll take him!"<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c10" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
